close_reason:
End-to-end verified:
- uv sync (5 members editable + 1 dev tool installed)
- uv run pytest: 115 passed
- All turnkey.{cargo,buck,buildsystem,cfg} importable from venv
- tk build //src/python/...: BUILD SUCCEEDED
- tk test //src/python/...: 20 tests passed across 3 targets
- tk build + tk run //src/examples/python-hello-deps: succeeds, six resolves through pydeps cell
- nix-build of compute-unified-features and gen-rust-buck: succeeds, tools show usage when invoked (turnkey.* imports resolve at Nix-build time)
- grep 'from python\.\|import python\.' src/: no matches
description:
End-to-end verification gate before closing the epic:

- 'uv sync' at root completes cleanly.
- 'uv run pytest' passes all tests across members.
- 'uv run python -c "from turnkey.cargo.toml import dep_is_available; from turnkey.buck.generator import generate_buck_file"' works.
- 'tk build //src/python/...' builds all internal Python targets.
- 'tk test //src/python/...' runs Buck2-side python_test targets.
- 'tk build //src/examples/python-hello-deps:python-hello-deps' builds; six resolves through pydeps cell.
- 'tk run //src/examples/python-hello-deps:python-hello-deps' prints expected output.
- 'nix build' of the whole flake still succeeds (no regressions in cell building).
- 'grep -rn "from python\.\|import python\." src/' returns nothing.
title: Verify uv workspace end-to-end
